answer: The top three product categories by order count are bed_bath_table, health_beauty, and sports_leisure. Bed_bath_table leads with 11,115 orders, significantly outperforming the second-place category, health_beauty, which has 9,670 orders. Sports_leisure rounds out the top three with 8,641 orders. These three categories together account for a substantial portion of total orders, indicating strong customer demand in home essentials, personal care, and recreational products.
sql:
SELECT COALESCE(ct.product_category_name_english, p.product_category_name) AS product_category, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN category_translation ct ON p.product_category_name = ct.product_category_name
GROUP BY product_categor
